title: Mysticism
description: A modpack focused on performance, including aesthetic-ready mods and QoL improvements!
body:
# **Welcome to Mysticism!**
This modpack aims to greatly enhance Minecraft's performance and overall gameplay experience, making it ideal for both single-player and multiplayer adventures.
The modpack is usually updated once I tested that all the mods work fine and there won't be any performance drops. 

---
## Why Choose This Modpack?

The Modpack aims to provide a set of __optimization and enhancement mods__, configured for maximum performance and compatibility with connected textures and shaders. I try to test and improve the modpack everyday, making sure to get also as many fixes as I can, so if you find bugs please feel free to tell me thru my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/rpf4gr52Zg).

This modpack is also designed with simplicity and ease of maintenance in mind. While it includes a selection of visual and quality-of-life improvements, the primary focus remains on optimization. Feel free to add, remove or use as-is the modpack as you like, and thank you again for downloading!

---

## **Features**

---

### Performance Improvements
- **Sodium** (by CaffeineMC): Overhauls Minecraft's rendering engine, boosting frame rates and reducing stutter.
  - **Sodium Extras** (by FlashyReese): Adds more configuration options for Sodium.
  - **Reese's Sodium Options** (by FlashyReese): Enhances Sodium's settings menu with additional options.
- **Lithium** (by CaffeineMC): Optimizes game physics and AI for better performance.
- **Starlight** (by Spottedleaf): Replaces the light engine with a faster, optimized version.
- **FerriteCore** (by malte0811): Reduces memory usage to prevent out-of-memory crashes.
- **Modern Fix** (by ishland): Addresses performance issues in modern Minecraft versions.
- **Thread Tweak** (by someaddon): Improves multi-threading for smoother gameplay.
- **MoreCulling** (by fxmorin): Enhances rendering by optimizing entity and block culling.
- **VeryManyPlayers** (by motd): Boosts server performance, especially for large player counts.

### Visual and Audio Enhancements
- **3D Skin Layers** (by tr7zw): Adds depth to player skins, making characters look more dynamic.
- **AmbientSounds** (by CreativeMD): Introduces ambient sounds to create a more immersive atmosphere.
- **Sound Physics** (by SonicEther): Improves sound propagation for a realistic audio experience.
- **Animation mods**: A set of animation mods chosen to improve the looks and the movement of your character and the mobs around you

---

## **QoL Improvements**

- **Bad Optimizations** (by fundryi): Provides performance tweaks that may reduce visual quality for better performance.
- **Better Mount HUD** (by Motschen): Improves HUD for mounts with more detailed information.
- **Camera Utils** (by iamkron): Adds camera utilities for better control and screenshots.
- **Continuity** (by Pepper_Bell): Ensures connected textures work seamlessly with resource packs.
- **Drippy Loading Screen** (by shedaniel) (may be removed): Adds a custom loading screen.
- **Do a Barrel Roll** (by threezach): Allows players to perform camera rolls.
- **Enhanced Block Entities** (by FoundationGames): Optimizes block entity rendering to reduce lag.
- **Essential** (by Sk1erLLC): Adds essential multiplayer features and enhancements.
- **LambDynamicLights** (by LambdAurora): Adds dynamic lighting where light sources illuminate the surroundings.
- **MidnightControls** (by TeamMidnightDust): Improves control customization, including controller support.
- **Mod Menu** (by Prospector): Adds a mod menu for easier mod management.
- **No Chat Reports** (by Aizistral): Disables the chat reporting feature for a safer chat experience.

---
## **Before Downloading know that:**

While this modpack aims to improve performance, results may vary depending on your hardware, settings and configuration. You can also add mods such as [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) for having an extra performance on nvidia cards.
